title: festuca geniculata var. longiglumis
intro: Festuca geniculata var. longiglumis, also known as long-gloved blue fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Festuca geniculata var. longiglumis include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
